allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./src/content/cities.json'\); const states=Object.keys\(d\); const cities=states.flatMap\(s=>Object.keys\(d[s]\)\); console.log\('states:', states.length, 'cities:', cities.length, 'total pages:', states.length + cities.length\)")
